rulings.Case Title: ZHEN HU VS. MARLON AMADOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of (Delta) Motion And (Delta) Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, January 12, 2015, Line 6. DEFENDANT MARLON AMADOR Notice Of (Delta) Motion And (Delta) Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint. is DENIED. Notice sufficiently apprises the defendant of the nature and grounds for termination of tenancy. Defendant cites no authority for the position that information regarding "details and dates" must be included in the Notice. Additionally, motion to quash is not the proper means for testing factual allegations in the complaint or for asserting affirmative defenses. =(501/REQ)
